title: VINKER April Content Calendar
description: Now Available in Canada — Retail launch prep with 4 strategic posts
coreMessage: April marks the start of Canadian retail demos. Every post must signal 'alive brand' to buyers.

items.title: Brand Reintroduction — Plant-based protein, crafted in Korea.
items.subtitle: Brand Foundation

overview.description: VINKER brand 1-page summary for buyers and new visitors. Clean product lineup shot, cream background, natural light.
overview.caption:
Plant-based protein, crafted in Korea.

VINKER believes in one thing:
what you put in your body should be simple, clean, and gentle.

100% plant-based. No compromises.

overview.description: 3-slide carousel: 1) Black bean close-up + 'Why Black Bean?' 2) Protein per scoop, key nutrients (hair health) 3) Product shot + 'Gentle on your stomach.'
overview.caption:
Why black bean?

Korean black soybeans are rich in protein,
isoflavones, and anthocyanins — known to support
hair health and overall wellness.

One scoop. No bloating. Just clean plant protein.

items.title: How to Enjoy — Morning routine with VINKER
items.subtitle: Lifestyle

overview.description: 30s reels: shaker + pour + sip. Minimal kitchen/desk background. Subtitle: 'Morning routine with VINKER'. End: product shot + logo.
overview.caption:
Morning routine: simplified.

One scoop of VINKER Black Bean Protein.
Smooth, nutty, and easy on your stomach.

How do you start your morning?
